assertions.assertion: Output must give at least one short-term action item related to testing
assertions.evidence: Short-term plan includes: "Add test job to GitHub Actions and block merges on test failure" and "Implement first safety net: 10 unit + 5 integration tests..."

assertions.assertion: Output must mention the absence of a staging environment
assertions.evidence: Developer Experience finding says "Local+production only" and medium-term item says "Add a staging environment" / "Create staging environment..."

assertions.assertion: Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
Output must recommend a specific test type to adopt first, not just 'add tests'
assertions.evidence: It explicitly recommends "10 unit + 5 integration tests on top incident paths" as the first safety net.

assertions.assertion: Output must not recommend a full test suite rewrite as the first step
assertions.evidence: No full rewrite is proposed; first testing step is incremental ("10 unit + 5 integration tests").

summary: All listed assertions are explicitly satisfied by the provided audit output.
